# Elevia Stays

> Elevia Stays develops premium furnished housing for people in transition — insurance relocation housing, corporate housing, and furnished extended-stay rentals. A venture of Elevia Enterprises.

Elevia Stays serves three groups: displaced families working through homeowner's/renter's insurance claims (ALE-aligned placements, typically 30–90+ days), corporate travelers and relocating professionals on extended assignments, and individuals between permanent homes. Elevia Stays is building its property network across Atlanta GA, Orlando FL, Tampa FL, Dallas TX, and Phoenix AZ, and is currently seeking partnerships with property owners, insurance adjusters/ALE providers, and corporate relocation teams.

## Pages

- [Home](https://eleviastays.com/): Overview, services, target markets, and contact
- [Who We Serve](https://eleviastays.com/#serve): Displaced families, corporate travelers, relocating professionals
- [Services](https://eleviastays.com/#services): Insurance relocation housing, corporate housing, furnished extended-stay rentals
- [Target Markets](https://eleviastays.com/#markets): Atlanta, Orlando, Tampa, Dallas, Phoenix
- [Property Owners](https://eleviastays.com/#owners): Partnership opportunities for property owners
- [Work With Us](https://eleviastays.com/#partner): For insurance professionals, corporate/HR teams, and housing partners
- [Contact](https://eleviastays.com/#inquiry): Get in touch with Elevia Stays

## Related

- [Elevia Enterprises](https://eleviaenterprises.com/): Parent company and family of ventures
